ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Advanced From Oct-22-25 To Sep-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Wendy Lee Wayne appeared via zoom for and with Balaji Ramamurthy (executor).

Ms. Wayne Stated to the court that she followed her supporting declaration on September 22, 2025. The Court granted the petition and signed the order in open court.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
